title: malus × platycarpa
intro: Malus × platycarpa, also known as the Chinese Pear or Chinese Crabapple, is a hybrid of the Malus baccata and Malus prunifolia species, characterized by its unique, heart-shaped fruit. The plant is rich in flavonoids and anthocyanins, which contribute to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Malus × platycarpa include the potential to reduce blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Malus × platycarpa can be prepared into herbal supplements, teas, or juices, and its fruit can also be eaten raw or used in traditional medicine.
